nasb.text: “And you shall provide a lamb a year old without blemish for a burnt offering to the Lord daily; morning by morning you shall provide it.

esv.text: “You shall provide a lamb a year old without blemish for a burnt offering to the Lord daily; morning by morning you shall provide it.

cnv.text: “每天你要預備一隻一歲無殘疾的羊羔，獻給耶和華作燔祭，每天早晨都要獻上。

ccb.text: “‘每天早晨，你们要献给耶和华一只毫无残疾的一岁羊羔为燔祭，
